6.name: Adaptability
references: VTM: Clanbook: Gangrel Pg. 37

6.name: Animal Succulence
6.description: Gain more vitae from animal blood
references: VTM: The Players Guide Pg. 77

6.name: Beast Walk
6.description: Hop from animal body to animal body
references: VTM: Lair of the Hidden Pg. 135

6.name: Deep Song
6.description: Influence the emotional state of listeners with a song
references: VTM: Clanbook: Ravnos Pg. 42

6.name: Eye of the Szlachta
6.description: Possess the body of a ghoul
references: VTM: Clanbook: Tzimisce Revised Pg. 69

6.name: Gap of Ages
6.description: As Feral Whispers, except give commands to an animal and all of its descendants
references: VTDA: Libellus Sanguinis 4: Thieves in the Night Pg. 76

6.name: Pact with Animals
6.description: Gain bestial qualities from the blood of an animal
references: DAV: Players Guide to Low Clans Pg. 144

6.name: Quell the Herd
6.description: As Quell the Beast but on groups of mortals or animals
references: VTM: Clanbook: Gangrel Revised Pg. 61

6.name: Sense the Savage Way
6.description: Share the senses of an animal
references: VTDA: Dark Ages Companion Pg. 78

6.name: Shared Soul
6.description: Meld minds with an animal and probe their memories
references: VTM: The Players Guide Pg. 77

6.name: Shepherd's Innocence
6.description: Gain the trust and attention of all animals
references: VTM: The Players Guide Pg. 76

6.name: Song in the Dark
6.description: Summon huge worms from the deep earth to shift the earth, creating caverns or earthquakes
references: VTM: Clanbook: Nosferatu Pg. 41

6.name: Species Speech
6.description: As Feral Whispers, except speak with all animals of a species present
references: VTM: The Players Guide Pg. 76

6.name: Tainted Oasis
6.description: Taint a land so that animals that feed from it become stronger and loyal
references: VTDA: Veil of Night Pg. 158

6.name: Tier of Souls
6.description: Gain memories or powers from the blood you drink
references: VTM: Clanbook: Tzimisce Pg. 44

7.name: Beast Shard
7.description: Split up your Beast and instill shards in others, making them more prone to Frenzy and making them more susceptible to your Disciplines
references: VTDA20: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 193

7.name: Conquer the Beast
7.description: Enter and leave your Frenzy at will
references: VTM: The Players Guide Pg. 77

7.name: Master's Voice
7.description: As Species Speech, except speak to all animals regardless of species
references: VTM: The Players Guide Pg. 77

7.name: Send the Eighth Plague
7.description: Summon beasts to devastate the harvests of a land
references: VTM: Players Guide to Low Clans Pg. 145

7.name: Stampede
7.description: Induce animalistic panic in a group of mortals
references: VTM: Clanbook: Gangrel Revised Pg. 62

7.name: Twist the Feral Will
7.description: Force an animal to obey you without speaking or remaining near it
references: VTDA: Dark Ages Companion Pg. 78

8.name: Crimson Fury
8.description: Your blood causes Frenzy in any who taste it and diablerists must fight off your Beast
references: VTM: Clanbook: Gangrel Revised Pg. 63

8.name: Mass Summons
8.description: Summon all animals within miles of you
references: VTM: The Players Guide Pg. 77
VTM: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 70

8.name: Taunt the Caged Beast
references: VTDA: Dark Ages Companion Pg. 78
VTM: Guide to the Camarilla Pg. 84
VTDA20: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 194

8.name: The Beast's Quills
8.description: Cause anyone who strikes at you to Frenzy
references: VTDA20: Vampire: The Dark Ages 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 194

8.name: Twin Spirits
8.description: Possess an animal's body without losing control of your own
references: VTM: The Players Guide Pg. 77
VTM: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 70

8.name: Unchain the Ferocious Beast
8.description: Cause a target's Beast to tear at them from within
references: DAV: Players Guide to Low Clans Pg. 146

9.name: Eyes of the Forest
9.description: Meld to the earth and use the animals in the forest as eyes.
references: VTM: Clanbook: Gangrel Revised Pg. 64

9.name: Flesh Bond
9.description: Physically meld with one or more animals
references: VTM: The Players Guide Pg. 78
VTM: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 70

9.name: Free the Beast Within
9.description: Enter a controlled Frenzy and gain several powers from the Beast
references: DAV: Players Guide to Low Clans Pg. 146

9.name: Unchain the Beast
9.description: Cause a target's Beast to tear at them from within
references: VTM: Guide to the Camarilla Pg. 84
VTM: Vampire: The Masquerade 20th Anniversary Edition Pg. 133

10.name: Army of Beasts
10.description: Control all animals within a mile
references: VTM: The Players Guide Pg. 78
VTM: The Players Guide Second Edition Pg. 70

10.name: Plot Device
references: VTM: Gehenna Pg. 182
